task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Negotiation' stage, 'Strategic Accounts' sales team, and 'Gone Dark - No Response' lost reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the CRM pipeline with a 'Negotiation' stage, a Sales Team named 'Strategic Accounts', or the Lost Reason 'Gone Dark - No Response' in settings/configurations.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Caspian Tech' was archived and its opportunities were transferred to 'Caspian Technologies'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Caspian Technologies' with the 'API Gateway Setup' opportunity, and 'Caspian Tech' no longer visible in the active customers list.

task_completion.description: Verify the updates to the 'Employee Portal Development' opportunity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the opportunity renamed to 'Employee Portal - Phase 1', showing Expected Revenue as $40,000, and an internal note stating 'Revenue and scope corrected per Q1 review.'

task_completion.description: Verify that high revenue opportunities (>= $100k) are assigned to 'Strategic Accounts', tagged 'Key Deal', and advanced to 'Negotiation' if applicable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Kanban or list view showing opportunities like 'Enterprise Data Platform' or 'Marketing Automation Platform' in the 'Negotiation' stage, assigned to the 'Strategic Accounts' team, and tagged 'Key Deal'.

task_completion.description: Verify that low revenue/probability new opportunities are marked as Lost with the correct reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Cloud Security Assessment' and 'API Gateway Setup' marked as Lost (e.g., with a red 'Lost' ribbon) with the reason 'Gone Dark - No Response'.

task_completion.description: Verify that rules based on internal notes (RivalSoft, champion leaving) are applied correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Opportunities like 'IT Infrastructure Modernization' or 'Business Intelligence Dashboard' showing 3 stars (Urgent), 'At Risk' tag, and a scheduled Call activity for '04/15/2026'. Opportunities like 'ERP System Upgrade' tagged 'Competitive'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all non-lost opportunities are tagged with 'Q1-Reviewed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Kanban or list view showing the 'Q1-Reviewed' tag on multiple non-lost opportunities (e.g., 'Annual Support Renewal', 'AI/ML Pipeline Integration').

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation and interaction within the Odoo GUI, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Odoo CRM, not a text editor, mock HTML, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: The agent manually processed the rules rather than executing a backend script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening individual opportunities, editing fields, and applying tags/stages manually.
